title: Trailer Graphics
description: This modpack makes Minecraft look like in the Mojang trailers
body:
![9GHONJB ULM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ba166ddd62b52e877243439c506f14c110805d0.png)

🌄 **Completely replicates the graphics from official trailers**

🕹️ **Updated animations for both mobs and the player**

⚙️ **Highly optimized for smooth gameplay**

📋 **Improved and polished interface**

##  You can see what Minecraft will look like in this trailer from Mojang.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gcf9FM4TbN4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
